// Generated by xlsynth::aot_builder from build spec "wide_sizes".
// top="wide_sizes"
// function="__xlsynth_standalone_wide_sizes"

pub use xlsynth_aot_runtime::{AotArtifactMetadata, AotError, AotRunResult, SBits, UBits};
#[allow(unused_imports)]
use xlsynth_aot_runtime::{
    read_leaf_element, write_leaf_element, AotElementLayout, AotRunnerLayout,
    StandaloneRunner,
};
unsafe extern "C" {
    #[link_name = "__xlsynth_standalone_wide_sizes"]
    fn __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_wide_sizes();
}
const INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[112];
const INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[16];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[112];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[16];
const RUNNER_LAYOUT: AotRunnerLayout = AotRunnerLayout {
    input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES,
    input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS,
    output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES,
    output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS,
    temp_buffer_size: 0,
    temp_buffer_alignment: 1,
};
/// Runtime-visible metadata for the generated standalone artifact.
pub const ARTIFACT_METADATA: AotArtifactMetadata = AotArtifactMetadata {
    abi_version: 1,
    entrypoint_symbol: "__xlsynth_standalone_wide_sizes",
    has_asserts: false,
    has_traces: false,
};
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Token {}
pub type Bits1 = bool;
pub type Bits7 = u8;
pub type Bits8 = u8;
pub type Bits16 = u16;
pub type Bits32 = u32;
pub type Bits64 = u64;
pub type Bits65 = [u8; 9];
pub type Bits73 = [u8; 10];
pub type Bits127 = [u8; 16];
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Input0 {
    pub field0: Bits1,
    pub field1: Bits7,
    pub field2: Bits8,
    pub field3: Bits16,
    pub field4: Bits32,
    pub field5: Bits64,
    pub field6: Bits65,
    pub field7: Bits73,
    pub field8: Bits127,
    pub field9: [Bits65; 2],
}
#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Output {
    pub field0: Bits1,
    pub field1: Bits7,
    pub field2: Bits8,
    pub field3: Bits16,
    pub field4: Bits32,
    pub field5: Bits64,
    pub field6: Bits65,
    pub field7: Bits73,
    pub field8: Bits127,
    pub field9: [Bits65; 2],
}
const INPUT0_LAYOUT: &[AotElementLayout] = &[
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 1,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 8,
        data_size: 4,
        padded_size: 4,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 16,
        data_size: 8,
        padded_size: 8,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 32,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 48,
        data_size: 10,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 64,
        data_size: 16,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 80,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 96,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
];
const OUTPUT0_LAYOUT: &[AotElementLayout] = &[
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 1,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 8,
        data_size: 4,
        padded_size: 4,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 16,
        data_size: 8,
        padded_size: 8,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 32,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 48,
        data_size: 10,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 64,
        data_size: 16,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 80,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    AotElementLayout {
        offset: 96,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
];
#[allow(clippy::deref_addrof, clippy::explicit_auto_deref, clippy::identity_op)]
fn encode_input_0(_value: &Input0, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 112);
    dst.fill(0);
    let encoded_bit: u8 = u8::from(*&((_value).field0));
    write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &[encoded_bit]);
    assert!(
        (((_value).field1) >> 7) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 7 bits"
    );
    write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1],
        &((_value).field1).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2],
        &((_value).field2).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 3],
        &((_value).field3).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 4],
        &((_value).field4).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 5],
        &((_value).field5).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    assert!(
        (((_value).field6) [8] >> 1) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
    );
    write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 6], &((_value).field6));
    assert!(
        (((_value).field7) [9] >> 1) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 73 bits"
    );
    write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 7], &((_value).field7));
    assert!(
        (((_value).field8) [15] >> 7) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 127 bits"
    );
    write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 8], &((_value).field8));
    for index_0 in 0..2 {
        assert!(
            ((((_value).field9) [index_0]) [8] >> 1) == 0,
            "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
        );
        write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 9 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field9)[index_0]),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 11);
}
#[allow(clippy::identity_op, clippy::let_and_return)]
fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 112);
    let output: Output = Output {
        field0: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &mut dst_bytes);
            assert!(
                dst_bytes[0] <= 1, "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 1 bit"
            );
            dst_bytes[0] != 0
        },
        field1: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1], &mut dst_bytes);
            let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            assert!(
                (decoded >> 7) == 0, "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 7 bits"
            );
            decoded
        },
        field2: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2], &mut dst_bytes);
            let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field3: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 3], &mut dst_bytes);
            let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field4: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 4];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 4], &mut dst_bytes);
            let decoded = u32::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field5: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 8];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 5], &mut dst_bytes);
            let decoded = u64::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field6: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 9];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 6], &mut dst_bytes);
            assert!(
                (dst_bytes[8] >> 1) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
            );
            dst_bytes
        },
        field7: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 10];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 7], &mut dst_bytes);
            assert!(
                (dst_bytes[9] >> 1) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 73 bits"
            );
            dst_bytes
        },
        field8: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 16];
            read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 8], &mut dst_bytes);
            assert!(
                (dst_bytes[15] >> 7) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 127 bits"
            );
            dst_bytes
        },
        field9: std::array::from_fn(|index_0| {
            {
                let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 9];
                read_leaf_element(
                    src,
                    &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 9 + index_0],
                    &mut dst_bytes,
                );
                assert!(
                    (dst_bytes[8] >> 1) == 0,
                    "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
                );
                dst_bytes
            }
        }),
    };
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 11);
    output
}
/// Reusable runner for the generated standalone AOT entrypoint.
///
/// A runner caches the standalone ABI buffers; create one runner per
/// concurrent caller instead of sharing it across threads.
pub struct Runner {
    inner: StandaloneRunner,
}
impl Runner {
    /// Creates a reusable runner for the generated standalone entrypoint.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if the standalone artifact metadata cannot initialize
    /// the ABI buffers required by the generated entrypoint.
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, AotError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: unsafe {
                StandaloneRunner::new(
                    &ARTIFACT_METADATA,
                    __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_wide_sizes as *const (),
                    &RUNNER_LAYOUT,
                )?
            },
        })
    }
    /// Runs the entrypoint and returns the output together with assertion
    /// events.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if standalone ABI buffer initialization or output
    /// decoding fails.
    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
        input: &Input0,
    ) -> Result<AotRunResult<Output>, AotError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run_raw();
        Ok(AotRunResult {
            output: decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0)),
            assert_messages: self.inner.assert_messages().to_vec(),
        })
    }
    /// Runs the entrypoint and returns only the decoded output value.
    ///
    /// # Errors
    ///
    /// Returns an error if output decoding fails or an XLS assertion fires.
    pub fn run(&mut self, input: &Input0) -> Result<Output, AotError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run_raw();
        if let Some(first_assertion) = self.inner.assert_messages().first() {
            return Err(AotError(format!("XLS assertion failed: {first_assertion}")));
        }
        Ok(decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0)))
    }
}
/// Creates a reusable runner for the generated standalone entrypoint.
pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, AotError> {
    Runner::new()
}
